zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes FitzWalter於大約1084年出生在英國波藍德格斯托可時，她的父親Walter FitzRoger20歲，母親Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun16歲。她與Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1135年在她的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes FitzWalter于大约1084年出生在英国波藍德格斯托可时，她的父亲Walter FitzRoger20岁，母亲Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun16岁。她与Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1135年在她的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWalter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , ‘son of Walter’.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes FitzWalter was born about 1084, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, her father, Walter FitzRoger, was 20 and her mother, Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun, was 16. She married Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1135, in her hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes FitzWalter est née environ 1084, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Walter FitzRoger, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1135, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes FitzWalter um 1084 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter FitzRoger 20 und ihre Mutter Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun 16. Sie hat Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1135 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes FitzWalter è nata il circa 1084 nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Walter FitzRoger, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1135, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes FitzWalterが約1084年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで生まれた時，父Walter FitzRogerは20歳，母Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluunは16歳であった。Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1135年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes FitzWalter(이)가 대략 1084년 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter FitzRoger(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1135년 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes FitzWalter nasceu aproximadamente 1084, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter FitzRoger, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1135, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes FitzWalter родилась около 1084 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter FitzRoger было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1135 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes FitzWalter nació aproximadamente 1084, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter FitzRoger, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Emmeline Berthe de Pitres de Baluun, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1135, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
